title: Build a Valid HTML Document
description: Create a complete learning roadmap document with metadata and a short ordered list.
instructions: Read requirements and inspect starter files.
Run tests; use failure evidence and hints.
Check keyboard and narrow-screen behavior before finishing.

starterFiles.html:
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <!-- Add viewport and title -->
</head>
<body>
</body>
</html>

requirements.description: Give the page a visible title

requirements.hint: Add at least one li inside ol.

hints: Add at least one li inside ol.
